overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (The Witcher 3) showing a character exiting an ornate glass palace onto a sunlit stone terrace lined with angel statues and red roses, overlooking a distant valley town during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace interior transitioning to terrace exit

events.description: moving from inside the palace through ornate glass doors onto the exterior terrace

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through the glass doors to exit the building onto the sunlit terrace

entered.detail: large ornate glass doors with golden metal frames separating interior from exterior terrace
decorative golden metal door handle on the glass door
massive ancient tree with sprawling green branches visible through the glass on the terrace
polished marble flooring of the palace interior with light reflections
sunlit stone tile flooring of the exterior terrace visible through the doors
interior wall with wooden paneling and decorative elements

segments.scene_description: The scene begins inside an ornate palace looking out through large glass doors. The camera moves forward, passing through the doors onto a sunlit stone terrace where a massive ancient tree dominates the view, with distant mountains visible in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace with ancient tree and valley overlook

events.description: player character briefly visible performing a quick turn with weapon drawn before continuing forward
first NPC comes into view standing near the terrace railing in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace admiring the view of the distant valley, town spires, and surrounding mountains

entered.detail: stone balustrade with gothic arches overlooking the valley below
tall stone statues of winged angels on pillars along the terrace edge
red rose bushes planted in planters along the balustrade
exterior glass wall of the palace building with ornate golden frames
distant town with church spires and towers visible in the valley below
mountain range visible in the background beyond the town

segments.scene_description: Now fully outside on the terrace, the camera walks along the sunlit stone path passing the massive ancient tree on the left. The terrace features ornate angel statues on pillars and red roses along the balustrade, with panoramic views of a distant town and mountains in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace walkway lined with angel statues and NPCs overlooking the valley

events.description: multiple NPCs visible walking along the terrace path in the same direction as the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the terrace walkway passing by angel statues and approaching other people near the railing

notable_agents.action: walking along the terrace railing enjoying the view of the valley

entered.detail: people walking and standing along the terrace near the railing overlooking the view

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the terrace walkway, now passing by NPCs who are walking and admiring the view. The large tree has passed out of view behind, while the row of angel statues on the left becomes more prominent as the camera approaches them, with the golden sun casting long shadows across the stone floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of an ornate palace out onto a sprawling, sunlit stone terrace overlooking a distant valley. It begins inside the palace, moving forward through large glass doors to reveal a massive ancient tree and distant mountains bathed in golden hour light. As the camera emerges fully onto the terrace, it glides along a stone path past the ancient tree, passing ornate angel statues on pillars and red roses lining the balustrade. The scene then shifts as the tree recedes from view, moving past NPCs admiring the panoramic vista of the town below. Finally, the camera approaches a prominent row of angel statues while the low sun casts long, dramatic shadows across the stone floor.
